name: Budget Setup
subtitle: Cheap parts. Real ambition.
completionText: You built more from less than anyone expected.
guideTone: practical, optimistic, strategic, teaches value and efficiency
guideIntroLine: It's not pretty, but it works. That already makes it dangerous.

transformationStages.name: Mismatched Mess
transformationStages.description: Cluttered low-budget setup with mismatched gear. Nothing coordinates. Cables tangle everywhere.

transformationStages.name: Coordinated Budget
transformationStages.description: Coordinated but still cheap workstation with second monitor and better layout.

transformationStages.name: Budget Battlestation
transformationStages.description: Surprisingly high-performance budget battlestation with organized visuals and efficient flow.

secrets.title: The Hidden Gem
secrets.description: One item labeled 'low quality' keeps appearing in unusual places.
secrets.hint: That cheap module shows up more often than it should.

secrets.title: The Dangerous Bargain
secrets.description: The guide jokes that the cheapest item is sometimes the most dangerous.
secrets.hint: Listen when the guide talks about bargains.

secrets.title: The Shifting Description
secrets.description: Hovering over the same cheap module several times changes its description.
secrets.hint: Read the same tooltip twice. Then a third time.

midSceneTwist.title: Hidden Efficiency Score
midSceneTwist.description: The room gains a hidden efficiency score that tracks your cost-performance ratio.
midSceneTwist.effectDescription: An efficiency metric appears. High efficiency unlocks bonus discount events and rare budget modules.

events.title: Discount Drop
events.description: A flash sale hits the marketplace. Components drop to half price for a limited window.

events.title: Cheap Peripheral Sale
events.description: A batch of budget peripherals becomes available. They're ugly but functional.

events.title: RGB Flicker Surge
events.description: The cheap RGB strips sync unexpectedly, creating a momentary power surge.

events.title: Bargain Bin Cache
events.description: Digging through the bargain bin reveals a compatible part buried under junk.
events.flavorText: Patience in cheap aisles pays off.

events.title: Cable Coupon Popup
events.description: A popup offers a coupon for cable accessories. Small savings compound.

events.title: Cashback Window
events.description: A brief cashback window opens. Every purchase returns a percentage.

events.title: Second Monitor Sync
events.description: The second monitor finally syncs with the first. Workflow efficiency jumps.
events.flavorText: Two screens think faster than one.

events.title: Marketplace Rush
events.description: A surge of marketplace activity creates arbitrage opportunities.

events.title: Counterfeit Gold Part
events.description: A 'gold' rated part arrives — but something feels off. It performs too well for its price.
events.flavorText: Not all labels tell the truth.

events.title: Collector's Budget Mouse
events.description: A rare first-edition budget mouse appears. Collectors would pay a fortune.

events.title: Sponsor Trial Package
events.description: A mysterious sponsor sends a trial package of premium components — for free.

roomLaw.name: Law of Cost-Efficiency
roomLaw.description: Cost-efficiency matters more than raw power
roomLaw.mechanic: Cheaper upgrades gain bonus value; expensive ones lose diminishing returns

landmark.name: The Discount Terminal
landmark.description: A cheap monitor that evolves into a trading hub
evolutionStages: The screen stabilizes and displays market feeds
Multiple screens show real-time trading data
A holographic trading floor projects from the terminal
The Discount Terminal orchestrates a galactic marketplace

hazard.name: Budget Overrun
hazard.description: Costs spike if you buy too fast
hazard.triggerCondition: Multiple purchases made in rapid succession
hazard.penalty: Purchase costs increase by 25% for a cooldown period

stabilizer.name: Careful Budgeting
stabilizer.mechanic: A cooldown timer between purchases grants cumulative cost reduction

completionCeremony: The budget rig hums with coordinated precision. Every cheap part earns its place.
midSceneTwistLine: Efficiency is becoming its own kind of intelligence.

completionReward.relicEffect: Improves cost-performance calculations and discount event value in future rooms

transitionIn.visual: Desk components slide into place from darkness. RGB flickers on one item at a time.
transitionIn.audio: Soft click-snap assembly sounds building rhythm
transitionIn.titleReveal: Title appears in clean budget-tech font

transitionOut.visual: Prices and tags flash across screen. Cheap parts blur into polished silhouettes.
transitionOut.audio: Cash register chime fading into creative energy
transitionOut.titleReveal: Budget metrics dissolve into next room glow

codexAdditions.title: Budget Hardware Archive
codexAdditions.content: A catalog of every cheap part that proved its worth.

codexAdditions.title: Efficiency Over Luxury
codexAdditions.content: The path that values clever spending over raw investment.

codexAdditions.title: Cheap Doesn't Mean Weak
codexAdditions.content: I learned more from $10 parts than from $1000 ones.

codexAdditions.title: Built From Almost Nothing
codexAdditions.content: The second room proved that ambition doesn't need a budget.
